comment_header: enabled: true | false. Shows the server name + Welcome subtitle (top-left).
comment_locale: UI language for built-in texts. Allowed: 'en' (default) | 'de'. Files: html/locales/<code>.json.
comment_background: type: 'video' | 'image' (alias 'images'). video = path to an .mp4. images = array of image paths (more than one shows carousel arrows + auto-advance). interval = ms to auto-advance images (0 = off). blur = pixels. The darkening (dim) is set in html/style.css via --bg-dim.
comment_audio: source: 'video' (use the bg video sound) | 'playlist' (play tracks) | 'none' (silent). volume = 0..1. loop / shuffle = true | false. controls = true | false (false hides the player UI). tracks = list of { src, title, artist } or a plain 'path' string.
comment_characters: enabled: true | false. Shows a row of character slot buttons (1, 2, ...); click one to reveal that character's card.
comment_show: Toggle individual fields on the character card. Each value: true | false.
comment_stats: enabled: true | false (master switch). players: true | false (player count chip). uptime: true | false (uptime chip).
comment_team: enabled: true | false. title = heading. groups = [{ name, members: [{ name, role }] }]. Optional per member: "image": "media/team/x.png" (shows a picture; omit for none).
comment_patchnotes: enabled: true | false. The content lives in html/patchnotes.json.
comment_rules: enabled: true | false. title = heading. groups = [{ name, items: ['...'] }]. Rules are numbered continuously across groups.

groups.name: General
items: Follow the instructions of the team.
Do not abuse bugs, report them instead.

groups.name: Roleplay
items: No combat logging during active situations.
Respect the new-life rule after death.

groups.name: Factions
items: No cop-baiting without an RP reason.
Hostage situations: max. 2 hostages with proper RP.
Radio must not be used for metagaming.

groups.name: Technical
items: On FPS drops, clear your cache first.
Report problems via a support ticket.

comment_motd: enabled: true | false. title + text are shown as the 'Message of the Day'.

motd.title: Message of the Day
motd.text: Welcome to the server! Please follow the rules and have a great time. Enjoy your roleplay!

comment_tips: enabled: true | false. interval = ms between rotating tips. The content lives in html/tips.json.
comment_social: enabled: true | false. links = [{ label, icon, url }]. icon: 'discord' | 'shop' | 'web'.
